obstacle_groups.label: NW bight — touches top and left walls (8 cells)
NE bight — touches top and right walls (8 cells)
SW bight — touches left and bottom walls (8 cells)
SE bight — touches right and bottom walls (6 cells)
Left wall upper — touches left wall (5 cells)
Left wall lower — touches left wall (5 cells)
Right wall upper — touches right wall (5 cells)
Right wall mid — touches right wall (5 cells)

gates.note: blocks downward x=2 run — beam can only go up through here
blocks upward x=2 run — beam can only go down through here
blocks downward x=8 run — beam can only go up through here
blocks upward x=8 run — beam can only go down through here
